privileged_info_summary: The task.json file for render_grid@1 contains no explicit metadata field. The task uses real Unsplash photographs (not synthetic data) as the base image for grid overlay operations. Two Unsplash image URLs are configured in the setup script: photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e (800x533 JPEG, 143826 bytes) and photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 (800x533 JPEG, 64487 bytes), both verified as accessible and valid image files.
